title: The Hidden Cache
content: Hidden inside a hollowed-out support beam, you find it: a small, battered notebook wrapped in waterproof plastic.||It contains a list of physical drop-off points for the Syndicate's cash deliveries. It's not just data; it's a map of how the city is being drained of its life.||Outside, you hear the distant squeal of tires. Time to go. The hunters are returning to the carcass.||📝 WALL BOARD UPDATED: Syndicate logistics map recovered.
